title: calea scabra var. livida
intro: Calea scabra var. livida is a plant species known as the "Mexican Dream Herb" or "Pipicha," belonging to the Asteraceae family. Traditionally used in Mexican folk medicine, this plant has been found to possess sedative and anxiolytic properties, making it a potential natural remedy for anxiety and insomnia. The leaves of the Calea scabra var. livida plant have been used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to promote relaxation, reduce stress, and improve sleep quality. In addition to its medicinal properties, the plant has been reported to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, contributing to its potential health benefits.
